title: hieracium fritzei subsp. uechtritzianum
intro: Hieracium fritzei subsp. uechtritzianum, also known as Uechtritz's hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hieracium fritzei subsp. uechtritzianum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress. The plant is traditionally prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be made into a salve or ointment for topical application.
